text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We're doing another training session devoted to
Osaka Hai prep.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: I'm gonna try one more time.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Yep.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Recently, we've been spending a good chunk of
our sessions in the pool.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Tosen Jordan has a fairly large build. To compete
over longer distances, she'll benefit from working
on her cardio.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We'll have less time to strategize for each
individual race, but if she wants to have a shot at
the senior spring season...

text_block_list.name: Fellow Trainer
text_block_list.text:
Trainer <username>. What
exactly is the idea here?

text_block_list.name: Fellow Trainer
text_block_list.text:
Tossing balls into the pool and having her
retrieve them... What kind of exercise is that?
choice_data_list:
The rule is that she has three minutes to get as
many as she can without taking a breath.

text_block_list.name: Fellow Trainer
text_block_list.text:
I wasn't asking for details! Isn't this just some
game for elementary schoolers?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It may seem like a simple game, but it steadily
builds her lung capacity, and as the number of
balls she can collect increases, it keeps her aware
of her own progress.

text_block_list.name: Fellow Trainer
text_block_list.text:
...I'm at a loss for words. You'll never win a
senior-year G1 with these silly methods. Take
that scrimmage the other day...

text_block_list.name: Fellow Trainer
text_block_list.text:
Yes, that's right. We split it into two runs, but
your "strategy" never changed.

text_block_list.name: Fellow Trainer
text_block_list.text:
Round the fourth corner, and go all out. Then just
fight to the finish.

text_block_list.name: Fellow Trainer
text_block_list.text:
I asked your trainee if she was really okay with
that, to which she replied she really had no
strategy at all!

text_block_list.name: Fellow Trainer
text_block_list.text:
She's in her senior year now. If you want her to
succeed, you can't stick with these simple,
childish—
choice_data_list: No. For now, simple is best.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Now that Jordan's goal is to become the greatest
dummy, the simpler the better when it comes to
her training.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
In fact, Tosen Jordan did pretty well in that
scrimmage.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The true strength of her running lies in her
mindset—the more aware she is of her opponents,
the more fixated she becomes on winning.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We've got tough battles ahead of us. So right
now, if we want to unlock her running's full
potential, my job is...

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Trainer! Let's go one more time!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
...To do whatever it takes, no matter how stupid it
may seem.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: It's the day of the Osaka Hai.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: S-soy sauce!

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
Noodles, broth, toppings! Put them together
and... close with capers!

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
Ah! Just this thing Golshi was doing! I have no
freaking clue what it means!

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
But you said to be even dumber than Golshi, so...
I thought I would try to, like, copy her...

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Aghhh, never mind! Just forget about it!
choice_data_list:
"Close with capers"... Is that "close" as in "end
closer"?

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Heck if I know! I was hoping you'd tell me!

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Ugh, come on! Why is this happening?

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Siiiiigh...

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: I know I'm a dummy, but do you really think I can get greatest dummy good?

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Ahhh...

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Well, here I go!

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Soy sauce!

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
Noodles, broth, toppings! Put them together
and... surge with capers!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: Huh? The heck you doin' over there?

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
Aghhh! Shut up! You think I don't know how
stupid this is?!

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
But I'm gonna surpass you! I'm gonna be the
dumbest to ever do it!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: Ohooo. Think you can outdo me, do ya?

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: Hahahaha! You're funny! All right, then!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: Bring it on. Show me what you got.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: The Osaka Hai begins.
